steps.title: Make a two-point table
steps.content: On May $1$, $x=0$ and there are $240$ views, so the starting value is $240$. Every $3$ days, the number increases by $40\%$, which means it is multiplied by $1+0.40=1.40$.

steps.title: Solve the unknown directly
steps.content: The exponent should count how many 3-day periods have passed. After $x$ days, the number of 3-day periods is $\frac{x}{3}$, so $$f(x)=240(1.40)^{x/3}$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice C (‘$f \left(x\right)=240{ \left(1.40\right)}^{\frac{x}{3}}$’) has the correct starting value, multiplier, and exponent. The other choices use decay factor $0.40$, and choice D (‘$f \left(x\right)=240{ \left(1.40\right)}^{3x}$’) uses exponent $3x$ instead of $x/3$, so C is correct.
